items.title: Streaming model output
items.description: Expose a streaming completion as a generator of text chunks so the UI renders tokens as they arrive instead of waiting for the full response.

items.title: Processing large corpora lazily
items.description: Read and clean documents line-by-line with generators so multi-gigabyte datasets can be embedded without loading everything into memory.

items.title: Data pipelines
items.description: Chain generators (read -> clean -> chunk -> embed) so each item flows through the stages one at a time, keeping memory flat.

items.title: Batching an iterable
items.description: A generator can group a stream into fixed-size batches (e.g. 100 chunks per embedding request) without first building a giant list.

items.title: Infinite / paginated sources
items.description: Generators model endless or paginated sources (a token stream, paged API results) by yielding the next item only when asked.
